backend/main.mo: Main actor defining Case, Activity, Document, and Comment types with persistent state maps, authorization mixins, and query/update functions for managing collection cases, activities, documents, and comments with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old Comment type (without action/outcome fields) to new Comment type (with action and outcome fields), initializing them as empty strings for existing comments.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features related to ActivityTimeline UI updates and backend Comment type modifications with action/outcome fields.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing summaries of all frontend component files including App, Layout, pages (TaskQueue, CaseDetail), and components (ActivitySection, ActivityTimeline, CaseCard, etc.) with their responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and CSS custom properties defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, 'Kollect Lite' title, root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication check, loading state, and conditional rendering of LoginPrompt or RouterProvider.
Activity section component with form inputs for action, outcome, and comments, History toggle button, and Add Comment button that validates all three fields before submitting via useAddComment mutation.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Displays a chronological timeline of case comments with timestamps, action/outcome pills, messages, and author information. Fetches comments via useGetCaseComments hook and sorts them newest-first.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card showing case summary including debtor name, status badge, customer ID, phone number, DPD badge with color coding, and contract ID. Navigates to case detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Displays a scrollable timeline of comments for a case using dummy data, with colored backgrounds rotating between sky, purple, and green. Shows timestamps and comment text with timeline dots and connectors.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a checkmark confirmation for 2 seconds after successful copy.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of dummy documents with file type icons, names, and upload dates, plus Upload and Scan buttons. Includes a preview button for each document.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with Kollect Lite branding, logo, and a logout button that clears Internet Identity authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper providing header, content area with Outlet for routing, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Centered login screen with Kollect Lite branding and a button to trigger Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: A decorative iPhone frame wrapper component with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area for mobile UI previews.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge for case status (ESCALATED/ACTIVE/PTP) with appropriate styling based on CaseStatus enum value.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines a Comment interface and exports an array of dummy comments for various cases, including agent names, timestamps, and comment text for testing purposes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor instance using Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating case data, activities, documents, and comments through the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system for Kollect Lite brand, including light and dark mode themes with teal primary colors and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component displaying debtor information, status, payment details, and sections for activities, documents, and phone mockup, with dummy case data lookup by case ID.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Defines the TaskQueue page component with dummy case data (20 collection cases) including debtor information, status, DPD, amounts, and phone numbers. Includes search functionality and displays cases using CaseCard and PhoneMockup components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support. Includes functions to clear parameters from URLs and session storage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations. Includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features related to ActivityTimeline component updates (sub-header, date/timestamp, action/outcome pills, comments) and a pending feature request for activity timeline display improvements.
